results.rendered_html:
ṛbhukṣin m. [ṛbhukṣaḥ vajraṃ svargo vā asyāsti ini] (Nom. ṛbhukṣāḥ, acc. pl. ṛbhukṣaḥ)
1 N. of Indra.
2 N. of the Maruts.
3 A Ṛbhu in general.
4 Governing far; reigning over Ṛbhus.
